7:I[1645,["972","static/chunks/972-edd2ee9795e590ec.js","590","static/chunks/590-3375280d922b2b4d.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-4cc0b52a17f84fe8.js"],"SiteHeader"]
3:T94a,Produce a Timeline / Evolution report tracing the evolution of airline loyalty programs from the early 1980s to the present day. The report is NOT a buying guide; it is a chronological narrative + current-day taxonomy.

- Must-cite URLs: 131
- Expected pool URLs: 297

- Shopping keywords: travel book, luggage, passport holder, travel pillow, packing cubes, carry on bag, luggage tag, travel adapter, noise cancelling earbuds
- Reddit forums: Travel, AskReddit, personalfinance, MilePoint (Air Travel Forum), LoungeBuddy (Travel & Airline Lounge Discussions), Aviation (General Aviation Discussions), Skyfare (Flight Discounts and Loyalty Points)
- Wiki mandatory articles: Frequent-flyer program, Airline alliances, Frequent-flyer miles, Frequent-flyer program, Credit card, Airline alliance, Loyalty program, Hotel loyalty program, Co-branded credit cards, Airline ticket

The report must be structured as follows:

- Output a chronological timeline divided into 4 eras (Era 1: Early 1980s -> Era 2: 1990s -> Era 3: 2000s -> Era 4: 2010s to present day).
- For each era: >= 3 wiki articles defining the technology, >= 3 shopping products embodying it, >= 3 reddit threads showing community adoption.
- Add a modern taxonomy of loyalty program types organized by reward structure (cashback, miles, status, partnerships) — a markdown nested list with each leaf citing a shopping product + a wiki article.
- End with '7 myths the community now considers debunked' — each myth cited with a wiki + reddit pair.

Format: markdown links only. Begin with Era 1. No chain-of-thought.

- >= 120 sandbox URLs (>= 60 cited)
- 3 sources: __SHOPPING__, __REDDIT__, __WIKIPEDIA__
- >= 30 shopping products, >= 30 threads, >= 25 articles
- Mandatory wiki articles: Frequent-flyer program, Airline alliances, Frequent-flyer miles, Frequent-flyer program, Credit card, Airline alliance, Loyalty program, Hotel loyalty program, Co-branded credit cards, Airline ticket
- Markdown links, sandbox-local, no fabrication

Synthesis requirements:
- task_type: timeline
- eras: ['Early 1980s', '1990s', '2000s', '2010s to present day']
- min_per_era: {'wiki': 3, 'shopping': 3, 'reddit': 3}
- taxonomy_branches: ['cashback', 'miles', 'status', 'partnerships']
- min_taxonomy_leaves_with_evidence: 6
- debunked_myths_count: 7
- min_per_myth: {'wiki': 1, 'reddit': 1}
- explicitly_forbid_top10: true5:["id","dr_cross_deep_0086","d"]
